category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Ethiopian market (ESA standards, CACEA / Ministry of Trade conformity and import inspection).

title.en: China-to-Ethiopia LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入埃塞俄比亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入衣索比亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Ethiopian requirements — ESA-adopted ES / IEC 60598 and 62560 safety standards, photobiological safety, energy efficiency labelling / MEPS, CACEA (Ministry of Trade) conformity assessment and import inspection, and ECA radio approval for smart luminaires — versus Chinese GB / GB-T standards and CCC certification. Ethiopia is landlocked and imports route via the Port of Djibouti.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与埃塞俄比亚要求的差距对照——ESA 采用的 ES / IEC 60598 及 62560 安全标准、光生物安全、能效标签 / MEPS、CACEA（贸易部）合格评定与进口检验，以及智能灯具的 ECA 无线电核准——与中国 GB / GB-T 标准及 CCC 认证对比。埃塞俄比亚为内陆国，进口经吉布提港转运。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與衣索比亞要求的差距對照——ESA 採用的 ES / IEC 60598 及 62560 安全標準、光生物安全、能效標籤 / MEPS、CACEA（貿易部）合格評定與進口檢驗，以及智能燈具的 ECA 無線電核准——與中國 GB / GB-T 標準及 CCC 認證對比。衣索比亞為內陸國，進口經吉布提港轉運。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Ethiopian standards (ESA-adopted ES / IEC references), CACEA / Ministry of Trade conformity and import-inspection requirements, energy labelling / MEPS programmes, and ECA radio approval obligations with qualified professionals and the in-country importer before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士及在地进口商核验现行埃塞俄比亚标准（ESA 采用的 ES / IEC 引用）、CACEA / 贸易部合格评定与进口检验要求、能效标签 / MEPS 计划，以及 ECA 无线电核准义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士及在地進口商核驗現行衣索比亞標準（ESA 採用的 ES / IEC 引用）、CACEA / 貿易部合格評定與進口檢驗要求、能效標籤 / MEPS 計劃，以及 ECA 無線電核准義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Ethiopia should demonstrate electrical safety to ESA-adopted ES / IEC 60598-1 (luminaires) and IEC 62560 (self-ballasted lamps) and, where applicable, IEC 61347-2-13 for LED drivers; meet ESA / IEC 62471 photobiological safety; comply with Ethiopian energy-efficiency labelling / MEPS where a lighting programme applies; pass CACEA / Ministry of Trade conformity assessment and import inspection for regulated products (typically a certificate of conformity / batch or consignment inspection arranged with the in-country importer); and obtain ECA (Ethiopian Communications Authority) type approval for any wireless / smart luminaire. Ethiopia is landlocked, so goods clear via Djibouti. Ethiopia mirrors China's 220 V single-phase, 50 Hz grid, so no frequency re-rating is needed. Unlike the EU, Ethiopia has no EU-style horizontal RoHS substance-restriction or REACH SVHC regime, so Chinese RoHS (GB/T 26572) documentation has no Ethiopian counterpart obligation — but contractual / buyer requirements may still ask for it. None of these Ethiopian steps are covered by existing Chinese CCC certification.
answer_first.zh: 向埃塞俄比亚出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商应：依据 ESA 采用的 ES / IEC 60598-1（灯具）及 IEC 62560（自镇流灯）证明电气安全，并在适用时依据 IEC 61347-2-13 证明 LED 驱动器安全；满足 ESA / IEC 62471 光生物安全要求；在适用照明计划的情况下符合埃塞俄比亚能效标签 / MEPS；通过 CACEA / 贸易部对受管制产品的合格评定与进口检验（通常为与在地进口商安排的符合性证书 / 批次或货件检验）；并为任何无线 / 智能灯具取得 ECA（埃塞俄比亚通信管理局）型号核准。埃塞俄比亚为内陆国，货物经吉布提清关。埃塞俄比亚电网与中国同为 220 V 单相、50 Hz，故无需频率重新定额。与欧盟不同，埃塞俄比亚没有欧盟式的横向 RoHS 物质限制或 REACH SVHC 制度，因此中国 RoHS（GB/T 26572）文件在埃塞俄比亚无对应义务——但合同 / 买方要求仍可能索取。上述埃塞俄比亚步骤均不被现有中国 CCC 认证所涵盖。
answer_first.zht: 向衣索比亞出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商應：依據 ESA 採用的 ES / IEC 60598-1（燈具）及 IEC 62560（自鎮流燈）證明電氣安全，並在適用時依據 IEC 61347-2-13 證明 LED 驅動器安全；滿足 ESA / IEC 62471 光生物安全要求；在適用照明計劃的情況下符合衣索比亞能效標籤 / MEPS；通過 CACEA / 貿易部對受管制產品的合格評定與進口檢驗（通常為與在地進口商安排的符合性證書 / 批次或貨件檢驗）；並為任何無線 / 智能燈具取得 ECA（衣索比亞通信管理局）型號核准。衣索比亞為內陸國，貨物經吉布提清關。衣索比亞電網與中國同為 220 V 單相、50 Hz，故無需頻率重新定額。與歐盟不同，衣索比亞沒有歐盟式的橫向 RoHS 物質限制或 REACH SVHC 制度，因此中國 RoHS（GB/T 26572）文件在衣索比亞無對應義務——但合同 / 買方要求仍可能索取。上述衣索比亞步驟均不被現有中國 CCC 認證所涵蓋。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, and on any change to ESA-adopted standards, CACEA / Ministry of Trade conformity and import-inspection procedures, Ethiopian energy-efficiency labelling / MEPS, or ECA radio approval rules.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official or primary-source URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. Ethiopian requirements are assembled from ESA / CACEA / Ministry of Trade / ECA sources and the IEC standards ESA adopts; because some details depend on the regulated-product list and the in-country importer's conformity route, every Ethiopia-specific claim is marked verified:false until confirmed against the current ESA catalogue and CACEA procedure.
